case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JAVIER A HERNANDEZ SILVA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SILVA, JAVIER A $1,682.23 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,787.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,682.23 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SILVA, JAVIER A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-17-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ SILVA, JAVIER A

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
